titleStmt.title: SII 25.153: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 153. (A.R. No. 153 of 1908.) MĀṈŪR, PALANI TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Chōḷēśvara temple.
This incomplete inscription may be assigned to the 14th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order of the king issued to the dēvakaṉmis of the temple of Vīrarājēndrachōḷīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Māṉūr alias Vīrarājēndrachōḷanallūr in Vaigāvūr-nāḍu granting 10 mā of land at Māṉūr along with income form taxes (specified) as iṟaiyili, for the food-offerings to the god Vīrarājēndra-Chōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār. The boundaries of the gift land are to the west of western entrance of the Piḷḷaiyār temple in the east, to the north of vaḻitiṭṭal in the south, to the east of the central Taḻaikuḻi in the west and to south of old dēvadāṉa in the north. Of the taxes mentioned the tax called Kāliṅgarāyar-viniyōgam is interesting to note. This was named after the chief Kāliṅgarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ cavantāpāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4vatu vaikāvūrṉāṭṭu māṉū
rāṉa virarājentira coḻaṉ nallūril Uṭaiyār virarājentira coḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil teva kaṉmikaḷukku nam O
lai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu . Iṉṉāyiṉār virarājentra coḷiśvaram Uṭaiyāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi palapaṭi nimantattukkum mutala
ṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa māṉūril viḻi Iṭṭalil nām kuṭutta nilam 10 mā Iṉnilam pattu māvukkum nāṉkellai (yāvatu)
melai vaācalil piḷḷaiyār koyilukku meṟkum (te) teṉpāṟkellai vaḻi Iṭṭalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai naṭuvil taḻai kuḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paḻan
tevatāṉattukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam pattumāvukku Ekavai Ukavai tirumuṉkāṭci Iṭṭaccu[ṅka(ka)] vari kāliṅkarāyar viniyokam
kūṟṟilakkai tiruvācal viṉiyokam kiṟṟuvari mukam pārvai Antarāyam vaṭṭam kārttikaipaccai kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟu meṉokkiya maram EpperpaṭṭaContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 25.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
